Mechanical Ventilator (14day) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a noninvasive mechanical ventilator while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
987 NONINVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD NONINVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD O0110G1C Therapies: Non-Invas Mechanical Ventilator (Disch) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a noninvasive mechanical ventilator in the last three days of their SNF stay.
